Config.NativeRecordingDesc: Prefers GPU native recording; falls back to FFmpeg if unavailable.
Config.QuarterOutputDesc: 1/4 output preserves aspect ratio, scaling width and height to half.
Config.OverlayDesc: Includes Dalamud/ImGui overlays; takes effect on next recording.
Config.AudioGameDesc: Records audio from the FFXIV process and its child processes only.
Config.AudioSystemDesc: Records all system audio from the default playback device.
Config.AudioOffDesc: Video will not contain an audio track.
Config.CleanupOff: Auto-cleanup is off; no recordings will be deleted.
Config.CleanupDesc: Only deletes Pocket Recorder recordings older than {0} days in the output folder.
Config.TelemetryDesc: Sends sanitized, anonymous diagnostic logs to help improve the plugin. No personal data is collected.
Config.EncodingModeAutoHw: Auto hardware encoder, falls back to CPU + FFmpeg
Config.EncodingSoftwareDesc: Software encoding (libx264) uses CPU instead of GPU. This may reduce game framerate during recording.
Floating.TooltipStop:
- Left-click to stop recording
- Right-click for menu
- Right-drag to move
Floating.TooltipStart:
- Left-click to start recording
- Right-click for menu
- Right-drag to move
List.CannotRenameRecording: Cannot rename a file currently being recorded
List.CannotOperateRecording: Cannot operate on a file currently being recorded
Cmd.StartFailed: Failed to start recording. Please check the log.
Cmd.AutoRecordUsage: Usage: autorecord on | off | toggle | status
Cmd.AutoRecordOn: Auto-record on countdown has been enabled.
Cmd.AutoRecordOff: Auto-record on countdown has been disabled.
Cmd.FloatingUsage: Usage: floating on | off | toggle | status
Cmd.FloatingShown: Floating record button is now shown.
Cmd.FloatingHidden: Floating record button is now hidden.
Cmd.FpsSet: Target FPS set to {0}, effective on next recording.
Cmd.BitrateSet: Video bitrate set to {0} Mbps, effective on next recording.
Cmd.AudioUsage: Usage: audio game | system | off | toggle | status
Cmd.AudioSet: Audio source set to {0}, effective on next recording.
Cmd.ParamsLine: Parameters: {0} FPS / {1} Mbps / Audio {2} / Dalamud UI {3}.
Cmd.OverlayUsage: Usage: overlay on | off | toggle | status
Cmd.OverlayOn: Dalamud UI recording has been enabled, effective on next recording.
Cmd.OverlayOff: Dalamud UI recording has been disabled, effective on next recording.
Cmd.HelpLine1: Commands: start, end, toggle, status, config, output
Cmd.HelpLine5: Parameters: fps 60, bitrate 32, audio game/system/off/status, overlay on/off/status
Cmd.HelpLine6: Short commands also work: /pktr start, /pktr end
Retention.Failed: Failed to clean up old recordings: {0}
Retention.SkippedRecording: Recording in progress; skipped old recording cleanup.
Retention.OutputDirNotExist: Output directory does not exist; skipped old recording cleanup.
Retention.RootDirectory: Output directory is a drive root; skipped old recording cleanup.
Retention.NothingToDelete: No old recordings to clean up.
NvencDriver.ToastMessage: NVIDIA driver is too old to enable native recording. Please update. Automatically downgraded to FFmpeg recording.
NvencDriver.ChatMessage: NVIDIA driver is too old to enable native recording. Automatically downgraded to FFmpeg recording. Please update your driver.
